creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221961
v1

Requires USES=meson (bug 253043) and USE_GITHUB=yes. Tested build on 11.4 i386, 12.1 amd64, 12.2 i386, 13.0 amd64 and runtime on Sway.

Upstream doesn't want Wayland support yet, so the fork was created. Given build/install phases don't differ much let's inherit from x11/rofi. Would you like to maintain it?

https://github.com/davatorium/rofi/pull/1139
https://github.com/lbonn/rofi/compare/1.6.1..1.6.1-wayland
